channel.title: Sergiu Shova on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Sergiu Shova on LMI

item.title: Ruthenium-Nitrosyl Complexes With Glycine, L-Alanine, L-Valine,L-Proline, D-Proline, L-Serine, L-Threonine, And L-Tyrosine: Synthesis,X-Ray Diffraction Structures, Spectroscopic And Electrochemicalproperties, And Antiproliferative Activity
